places.name: Mathura
places.modernInfo: Krishna Janmabhoomi temple marks the exact birthplace. One of 7 sacred cities.

scenes.title: Birth of Krishna
scenes.description: Krishna was born in a prison cell to Devaki and Vasudeva at midnight. The chains fell off and the guards slept as the divine child appeared.

scenes.title: Vasudeva crosses the Yamuna
scenes.description: Vasudeva carried the infant Krishna in a basket through the flooded Yamuna river to safety in Gokul. The river parted to let them pass.

scenes.title: Krishna defeats Kansa
scenes.description: Krishna returned to Mathura, defeated the wrestlers and finally killed his evil uncle Kansa, freeing his parents from prison.

places.name: Gokul
places.modernInfo: Village where Krishna spent his infancy. Nand Bhavan temple marks Nanda's home.

scenes.title: Putana is slain
scenes.description: The demoness Putana came disguised as a beautiful woman to poison the infant Krishna. Krishna sucked out her life force as he drank her milk.

scenes.title: Krishna uproots the Yamalarjuna trees
scenes.description: The toddler Krishna, tied to a mortar as punishment, dragged it between two trees — Nalakuvara and Manigriva cursed as trees — and freed them.

places.name: Vrindavan
places.modernInfo: City of 5000+ temples. Banke Bihari, ISKCON, Prem Mandir are major shrines. The Yamuna flows nearby.

scenes.title: Raas Leela
scenes.description: Krishna played his flute at midnight and the Gopis left everything to dance with him in the forest. For each Gopi, Krishna multiplied himself so all danced with him simultaneously.

scenes.title: Krishna steals butter
scenes.description: Krishna the butter thief snuck into neighbours' homes, stood on his friends' shoulders to reach hanging pots of butter, and shared it with the monkeys.

scenes.title: Kaliya Daman
scenes.description: The multi-headed serpent Kaliya had poisoned the Yamuna. Krishna dived in, danced on its hoods, and subdued it — forcing it to leave for the ocean.

places.name: Govardhan Hill
places.modernInfo: Pilgrims walk the 21km parikrama (circumambulation) of the hill. Manasi Ganga lake is at its base.

scenes.title: Krishna lifts Govardhan
scenes.description: Indra sent furious storms to punish the villagers for not worshipping him. Krishna lifted the entire Govardhan hill with one finger as an umbrella to shelter everyone.

scenes.title: Indra surrenders
scenes.description: After 7 days, Indra accepted defeat. He came down from the heavens and bowed before Krishna, recognising him as the Supreme Being.

places.name: Dwarka
places.modernInfo: One of the 4 Char Dham pilgrimage sites. Dwarkadhish temple is over 2500 years old. Marine archaeology found submerged structures offshore.

scenes.title: Krishna builds Dwarka
scenes.description: Architect Vishwakarma built the golden city of Dwarka overnight on land reclaimed from the sea — 12 yojanas of divine construction for Krishna's new kingdom.

scenes.title: Dwarka submerged
scenes.description: 36 years after the Mahabharata war, as Krishna predicted, the ocean reclaimed Dwarka. The city sank into the sea exactly as he had prophesied.
